query: SELECT qs.id, qs.submittedAt, COUNT(qa.id) as answerCount FROM quiz_submissions qs LEFT JOIN quiz_answers qa ON qs.id = qa.submissionId WHERE qs.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Roddy Barksdale') GROUP BY qs.id;
